phrases.en: After dinner, Dan settled onto the couch to relax.
phrases.zh: 晚饭后，丹窝在沙发上放松。

phrases.en: He switched on the console and the TV screen.
phrases.zh: 他打开了游戏机和电视屏幕。

phrases.en: He picked up the wireless controller and checked its battery.
phrases.zh: 他拿起无线手柄，查看了它的电量。

phrases.en: He slipped on his headset and adjusted the microphone.
phrases.zh: 他戴上耳机，调整了麦克风。

phrases.en: He logged into his account with his username and password.
phrases.zh: 他用用户名和密码登录了自己的账号。

phrases.en: He scrolled through the menu and loaded his saved game.
phrases.zh: 他浏览了菜单，载入了存档的游戏。

phrases.en: He chose an easy level first to warm up quickly.
phrases.zh: 他先选了一个简单的关卡，迅速热身。

phrases.en: He pressed the buttons rapidly to dodge the enemies.
phrases.zh: 他飞快地按着按键，躲避敌人。

phrases.en: He chatted cheerfully with his friends through the headset.
phrases.zh: 他透过耳机愉快地和朋友们聊天。

phrases.en: He finally beat the boss and earned a high score.
phrases.zh: 他终于打败了大头目，赢得了高分。

phrases.en: He saved his progress and turned off the console.
phrases.zh: 他保存了进度，关掉了游戏机。

phrases.en: He set the controller down and went to bed, tired but happy.
phrases.zh: 他放下手柄，去睡觉了，虽然累却很开心。
